# 1.9 Analysis & Decomposition Domain Objects

## Two Table Layers

| Layer | Tied To | Tables | Purpose |
|-------|---------|--------|---------|
| **Bill text** | Text version | `bill_text_sections`, `bill_concept_groups`, `bill_concept_group_sections` | Parsed sections + clustered concept groups from decomposition. Immutable once produced. |
| **Analysis** | Analysis run | `bill_analyses`, `bill_concept_summaries`, `bill_analysis_topics`, `bill_findings`, `bill_fiscal_estimates`, `amendment_findings` | LLM analysis results per pass. Each run produces separate rows with individual embeddings. |

## Classes

**Decomposition DOs (tied to text version):**

| Class | Table | Key Columns |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `BillConceptGroupDO` | `bill_concept_groups` | conceptGroupId (UUID PK), versionId (FK), billId (FK), groupId (String), title (String), simplifiedText (String), embedding (Option[Array[Float]]), createdAt |
| `BillConceptGroupSectionDO` | `bill_concept_group_sections` | conceptGroupId (FK), sectionId (FK) |

**Analysis DOs (tied to analysis run):**

| Class | Table | Key Columns |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `BillAnalysisDO` | `bill_analyses` | analysisId (UUID PK), billId (FK), versionId (UUID FK), status (String: "in_progress"/"completed"/"failed"), summary (Option), topics (List[String]), readingLevel (Option), keyPoints (List[String]), passesExecuted (List[Int]), highestModelUsed (Option[String]), pass1Model (Option), pass2Model (Option), pass3Model (Option), embedding (Option[Array[Float]]), highProfileScore (Option[Double]), mediaCoverageLevel (Option[Double]), appropriationsEstimate (Option[BigDecimal]), stanceConfidence (Option[Double]), routingReasoning (Option[String]), overallConfidence (Option[Double]), crossConceptContradictionScore (Option[Double]), expectedVoteContention (Option[Double]), contradictionDetails (Option[String]), routingReasoningPass2 (Option[String]), failureReason (Option[String]), createdAt, completedAt (Option) |
| `BillConceptSummaryDO` | `bill_concept_summaries` | conceptSummaryId (UUID PK), analysisId (FK), billId (FK), conceptGroupId (Option[UUID] FK), passNumber (Int), topics (List[String]), summary (Option), readingLevel (Option), keyPoints (List[String]), embedding (Option[Array[Float]]), createdAt |
| `BillAnalysisTopicDO` | `bill_analysis_topics` | topicId (UUID PK), analysisId (FK), billId (FK), conceptGroupId (Option[String]), passNumber (Int), topic, confidence (Float) |
| `BillFindingDO` | `bill_findings` | findingId (UUID PK), billId (FK), analysisId (Option[UUID] FK), findingTypeId (Int FK), passNumber (Int), summary, details (Option), conceptGroupId (Option[String]), severity (Option[String]), confidence (Option[Float]), affectedSection (Option), affectedGroup (Option), embedding (Option[Array[Float]]), llmModel, analyzedAt |
| `BillFiscalEstimateDO` | `bill_fiscal_estimates` | fiscalEstimateId (UUID PK), analysisId (FK), billId (FK), conceptGroupId (Option[UUID] FK), passNumber (Int), estimatedCost, timeframe, confidence (Float), assumptions (List[String]), llmModel, createdAt |
| `AmendmentFindingDO` | `amendment_findings` | findingId (UUID PK), amendmentId (FK), findingTypeId (Int FK), summary, details (Option), severity (Option), confidence (Option[Float]), affectedSection (Option), embedding (Option[Array[Float]]), llmModel, analyzedAt |
| `FindingTypeDO` | `finding_types` | findingTypeId (Int PK, auto-generated SERIAL), code (String — snake_case, UNIQUE), name (String), description (Option) |

## Field Notes

**`BillConceptGroupDO`** is tied to `versionId` (text version), not `analysisId`. `simplifiedText` is Haiku-produced coherent summary of grouped sections. `embedding` is 1536-dim vector of simplified text. Multiple analysis runs reference same concept groups.

**`BillConceptGroupSectionDO`** links `bill_text_sections` to concept groups. A section belongs to exactly one group.

**`BillAnalysisDO`** tracks the analysis run. `summary` and `topics` are bill-wide Pass 1 results (backward-compat + event payloads). Detailed per-concept summaries in `BillConceptSummaryDO` and `BillAnalysisTopicDO`. `highestModelUsed` stores most capable model across all passes. Per-pass models in `pass1Model`, `pass2Model`, `pass3Model`. `status` lifecycle: "in_progress" → "completed" or "failed". Routing score columns denormalized for auditability; Pass 2 columns NULL when only Pass 1 ran. `passesExecuted` is integer array (e.g., `[1, 2]`).

**`BillConceptSummaryDO`** is pure analysis artifact. References concept group via `conceptGroupId` and carries Pass 1 results for that group. Decomposition data (group title, simplified text, sections) lives in `BillConceptGroupDO` — not duplicated. For short bills skipping decomposition, `conceptGroupId` points to single full-bill concept group.

**`BillFindingDO`** is universal finding row. All finding types use same table; `findingTypeId` discriminates. `conceptGroupId` is `None` for bill-wide findings, `Some(groupId)` for per-concept. Nullable fields vary by type:

| Finding Type | severity | confidence | affectedSection | affectedGroup |
|-------------|----------|-----------|-----------------|---------------|
| `pork` | Yes | No | Yes | No |
| `rider` | Yes | No | Yes | No |
| `impact_analysis` | Yes | No | No | Yes |
| `stance_detection` | No | Yes | No | No |
| `topic_extraction` | No | Yes | No | No |
| `bill_summary` | No | No | No | No |
| `fiscal_estimate` | No | Yes | No | No |
| `lobbying` | Yes | No | Yes | No |
| `constitutional` | Yes | No | Yes | No |

**`BillFiscalEstimateDO`** is separate from findings due to distinct structure (`estimatedCost`, `timeframe`, `assumptions`). At most one per analysis run.

**`BillAnalysisTopicDO`** normalizes topic confidence scores. Flat `topics TEXT[]` on `bill_analyses` for events. This table carries topic + confidence pairs from `TopicClassificationOutput`, with optional `conceptGroupId` for per-concept vs. bill-wide distinction.

## Mapping: LLM Output Schemas → DOs

| Output Schema (§1.6) | Persisted As | DO |
|----------------------|-------------|-----|
| `BillSummaryOutput` (overall) | `bill_analyses.summary` + `.reading_level` + `.key_points` | `BillAnalysisDO` |
| `BillSummaryOutput` (per-concept) | `bill_concept_summaries.summary` + `.reading_level` + `.key_points` (→ `bill_concept_groups`) | `BillConceptSummaryDO` → `BillConceptGroupDO` |
| `TopicClassificationOutput` (overall) | `bill_analyses.topics` (flat) + `bill_analysis_topics` (with confidence) | `BillAnalysisDO` + `BillAnalysisTopicDO` |
| `TopicClassificationOutput` (per-concept) | `bill_analysis_topics` with `concept_group_id` set | `BillAnalysisTopicDO` |
| `PorkDetectionOutput` | One row per `PorkFinding` | `BillFindingDO` (findingTypeId = "pork") |
| `ImpactAnalysisOutput` | One row per `ImpactItem` | `BillFindingDO` (findingTypeId = "impact_analysis") |
| `StanceClassificationOutput` | One row per `TopicStance` | `BillFindingDO` (findingTypeId = "stance_detection") |
| `FiscalEstimateOutput` | One row | `BillFiscalEstimateDO` |
| `AlignmentScoreOutput` | Score tables (§1.5) | N/A |

## Acceptance Criteria — 1.9

**Functional — Decomposition:**
1. `BillConceptGroupDO` fields match all columns in `bill_concept_groups` (snake_case → camelCase).
2. `BillConceptGroupDO` has Doobie auto-derived `Read` and `Write` instances.
3. `BillConceptGroupDO.embedding` is `Option[Array[Float]]` (pgvector).
4. `BillConceptGroupDO.versionId` is UUID FK to `bill_text_versions`.
5. Multiple `BillConceptGroupDO` per version; unique constraint on `(versionId, groupId)`.
6. `BillConceptGroupSectionDO` fields match `bill_concept_group_sections`: conceptGroupId (UUID), sectionId (UUID).
7. `BillConceptGroupSectionDO` has Doobie auto-derived `Read` and `Write` instances.

**Functional — Analysis:**
8. Every analysis DO case class has fields matching every database table column (snake_case → camelCase).
9. Every analysis DO has Doobie auto-derived `Read` and `Write` instances (no manual `toPojo`).
10. `BillAnalysisDO.embedding` is `Option[Array[Float]]`.
11. `BillConceptSummaryDO.embedding` is `Option[Array[Float]]`.
12. `BillConceptSummaryDO.conceptGroupId` is `Option[UUID]` FK to `bill_concept_groups`. `None` only for legacy/short bills.
13. `BillConceptSummaryDO.topics` and `keyPoints` are `List[String]` (TEXT[]).
14. `BillFindingDO.embedding` is `Option[Array[Float]]`.
15. `AmendmentFindingDO.embedding` is `Option[Array[Float]]`.
16. `BillAnalysisDO.topics` is `List[String]` (TEXT[]).
17. `BillFiscalEstimateDO.assumptions` is `List[String]` (TEXT[]).
17a. `BillAnalysisDO.status` is `String`: "in_progress", "completed", "failed".
17b. `BillAnalysisDO.versionId` is `UUID` FK to `bill_text_versions`.
17c. `BillAnalysisDO.passesExecuted` is `List[Int]` (INT[]).
17d. `BillAnalysisDO.highestModelUsed` is `Option[String]` — populated on completion.
17e. `BillAnalysisDO` routing score columns (highProfileScore, mediaCoverageLevel, appropriationsEstimate, stanceConfidence, routingReasoning) are all `Option` — populated after Pass 1.
17f. `BillAnalysisDO` Pass 2 columns (overallConfidence, crossConceptContradictionScore, expectedVoteContention, contradictionDetails, routingReasoningPass2) are all `Option` — NULL when Pass 2 did not run.
17g. `BillAnalysisDO.failureReason` is `Option[String]` — populated only when status = "failed".
17h. `BillAnalysisDO.createdAt` is `Instant`; `completedAt` is `Option[Instant]`.
17i. `BillFindingDO.passNumber` is `Int` (which pass produced this finding).
17j. `BillAnalysisTopicDO.passNumber` is `Int`.
17k. `BillConceptSummaryDO.passNumber` is `Int`.
17l. `BillFiscalEstimateDO.passNumber` is `Int`.
17m. `BillFiscalEstimateDO.conceptGroupId` is `Option[UUID]` FK to `bill_concept_groups`.
18. `BillFindingDO.conceptGroupId` is `Option[String]` — `None` for bill-wide, `Some(groupId)` for per-concept.
19. `BillFindingDO.severity` is `Option[String]` — only for pork, rider, impact, lobbying, constitutional.
20. `BillFindingDO.confidence` is `Option[Float]` — only for stance, topic, fiscal.
21. `BillAnalysisTopicDO.conceptGroupId` is `Option[String]` — `None` for bill-wide, `Some(groupId)` for per-concept.
22. `FindingTypeDO` fields: findingTypeId (Int PK, auto SERIAL), code (String snake_case, UNIQUE), name (String), description (Option[String]). Never hardcode numeric IDs; use `code` lookup.

**Error Handling:**
23. All Float fields validate range 0.0–1.0 at database level (CHECK) or caller-enforced.

**Tests:**
24. Round-trip Doobie `Read`/`Write` test for `BillConceptGroupDO`.
25. Round-trip Doobie `Read`/`Write` test for `BillConceptGroupSectionDO`.
26. `BillConceptGroupDO` with `embedding = None` round-trips correctly.
27. Multiple concept groups per version with distinct `groupId` values round-trip.
28. Round-trip Doobie `Read`/`Write` test for every analysis DO.
29. `BillConceptSummaryDO` with `conceptGroupId = Some(uuid)` round-trips.
30. `BillConceptSummaryDO` with `conceptGroupId = None` round-trips.
31. `BillFindingDO` with all nullable fields as `None` round-trips.
32. `BillFindingDO` with all nullable fields populated round-trips.
33. `BillConceptSummaryDO` with empty `List` fields round-trips as empty `TEXT[]`.
34. `BillAnalysisTopicDO` with `conceptGroupId = None` and `Some(...)` both round-trip.
35. `BillFiscalEstimateDO` with multiple assumptions round-trips `TEXT[]` correctly.
36. Circe codec round-trip test for each decomposition and analysis DO (Pub/Sub serialization).
